response.step_by_step_log: 1. 00:00-02:15: Performer (Juufuutei Raden) performs 'Around The World'. Metadata on screen matches 'Around The World' by Monkey Majik. 2. Searched for lyrics using Monkey Majik. Found full lyrics. 3. 02:16-04:59: Special announcement of a collaboration with 'THE NATIONAL GALLERY LONDON'.
response.global_summary: A video of Juufuutei Raden performing 'Around The World', followed by a special announcement regarding a collaboration with the National Gallery, London.

scenes.description: Juufuutei Raden performs a vocal cover of 'Around The World' by Monkey Majik on stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Every night I look to the skies
And wonder what we did
Always a naive point of view that breaks us in the end
If I could find the meaning of it all I'd take the chance
Maybe in time
We'll walk the mile and change it if we can
It's now and always (How did we get this far)
Always (We're making a brand new start)
always (Nothing will hold me down)
always (Wave goodbye to me!)
Around the world 新しいことに
Around the world フミダスチカラで
Around the world 世界は変わるさ
But don't run away 'cause if it's not OK!
I'll chage that world Into something better honey!
果てしなく広がるこの大地を
僕らはまた歩き続けるさ
全ての意味が分かるのならば
この瞳で何を見つめるのだろう
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Every night I look to the skies
And wonder what we did
Always a naive point of view that breaks us in the end
If I could find the meaning of it all I'd take the chance
Maybe in time
We'll walk the mile and change it if we can
It's now and always (How did we get this far)
Always (We're making a brand new start)
always (Nothing will hold me down)
always (Wave goodbye to me!)
Around the world for something new
Around the world with the power to take a step
Around the world the world will change
But don't run away 'cause if it's not OK!
I'll change that world into something better honey!
I will keep walking on this endlessly spreading earth again
If I could understand the meaning of it all
What would I be looking at with these eyes?

scenes.description: Special announcement text displays, followed by Juufuutei Raden explaining a collaboration with the National Gallery, London, and showing merchandise.
